warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
5 Snatch Pull
5 Hang Muscle Snatch
5 Hang Power Snatch (pause in catch)
0530 Specific Warm Up
10 Scap Pull Ups
10 Scap Push Ups
2 mins on Assault Bike
10 Beat Swings
10 PVC Shoulder Opener

strength.name: Hang Power Snatch
strength.description:
1x3 | 1x3
E2MOM 12min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3
08:00 3
10:00 3

strength.name: Back Squat
strength.description:
4x6 | * Elbows to back pocket
* Rib Cage to Pelvis
* Screw feet OUT into the floor | E2MOM 12 mins
BUILD 2 sets
00:00 10 @ 50%
02:00 8 @ 60%
HOLD 4x6
04:00 6 @ 65%
06:00 6 @ 65%
08:00 6 @ 65%
10:00 6 @ 65%

strength.name: Squat Clean Thruster
strength.description: 1x1 | 7 mins to build to a 1RM thruster

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
3 RFT
200m Run
12 T2B
9 Thrusters @ 50/35kg
Increase weight each round by 10/5kg

hypertrophy.reasoning: Back and arm work balances horizontal pulling, aids recovery, avoids compounding lower-body and pressing fatigue.
suggested_exercises: Nordic Curls or Leg Curl Machine 2x8-10

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Hang Power Snatch, 1 by 3. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Strength: Squat Clean Thruster, 1 by 1. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 200m Run, 12 T2B, 9 Thrusters @ 50/35kg. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
